archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) applied to a Dark Mode Base
description: A focus-friendly dark mode study dashboard with highly saturated neon/pastel accents. Time/duration values are strictly solid black text on bright vibrant background chips to ensure legibility and create a playful aesthetic contrast.

headings.usage: Use for all main dashboard headings, hero numbers, and motivational messages.

body.usage: Use for labels, lists, session notes, and general UI text.

mono.usage: Use specifically for the Pomodoro Timer countdown and schedule clock.

layout.structure: Sidebar navigation (left) + Main Content Area (center) + Contextual Panel (right, optional for Pomodoro/Schedule).
layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8 on containers to let the dark mode breathe.
layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, completely pill-shaped (rounded-full) for tags, chips, and buttons.

duration_chip.instruction: CRITICAL: Per user request, MUST use solid black text for any duration/time metrics (e.g., '7 hr', '45 min'). Wrap these values in a brightly colored background chip (e.g. `bg-[#FFD600] text-black px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-bold`).

cards_and_surfaces.style: Dark structural base. `bg-[#13131A]` with subtle 1px border (`border-[#272730]`). Avoid heavy drop shadows in dark mode; instead, rely on colorful glowing hover states or sharp accent borders on the left side of active cards.

pomodoro_timer.style: Massive circular timer in the center of its section. Clean & minimal. Use SVG to draw a vibrant neon progress ring (using one of the accent colors like Sky or Mint). Use JetBrains Mono for the countdown text (white text for timer, unless placed inside a bright background). Playful controls (Play/Pause) underneath.

weekly_chart.style: Bar chart with rounded tops (radius=[4, 4, 0, 0]). Bars should alternate using the playful accent palette or use a solid vibrant Mint/Yellow. The tooltip must have a dark background with white/accent text for contrast.
weekly_chart.grid: Hide vertical grid lines. Use subtle dashed horizontal grid lines (`stroke-[#272730]`).

schedule_clock.style: List format for alarms with a large prominent current time clock at the top. Incorporate custom music upload via a playful 'file input' button disguised as a neon music note button.

forms_and_inputs.style: Shadcn components heavily customized: dark background inputs (`bg-[#0A0A0F]`), rounded-xl, 1px subtle border, active focus state gets a vibrant 2px ring (`focus:ring-[#FFD600]`).

background_image.description: Dark, moody abstract background with subtle light streaks. Apply with opacity (e.g., 5-10%) overlaid on the main background color to give an 'upgraded' textured feel without distracting.

icons.style: Duotone or bold weight to match the playful aesthetic.

motion.hover_states: Buttons and interactive cards should slightly scale up (`hover:-translate-y-1`) with a quick transition (`transition-transform duration-200`).
motion.progress_bars: Smooth width transitions for the daily goal progress bar.

testing.data_testid_convention: All interactive elements and key informational elements (e.g., duration chips, submit buttons, pomodoro play button, subject list items) MUST include a kebab-case, role-based `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="start-pomodoro-btn"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Bricolage Grotesque, DM Sans, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts.
Implement the duration chips EXACTLY as specified in 'duration_chip' (black text on bright background).
Ensure dark mode is forced or set as the default base, with the vibrant accents providing the 'playful' feel.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Arial.
